CIPHER.410.cipherString: The sea-shore is a sort of neutral ground, a most advantageous point from which to contemplate this world.
CIPHER.410.question: During a field trip, you notice these strange markings on a metal plaque. They represent a quote by Henry David Thoreau, encoded using an Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.410.author: Henry David Thoreau

CIPHER.403.cipherString: Things are never quite as scary when you've got a best friend.
CIPHER.403.question: A mysterious postcard arrives from an unknown sender. It contains a coded quote by Bill Watterson, written in a Complete Columnar. The quote has VERQUIT somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.403.author: Bill Watterson

CIPHER.387.question: Your science fair project logs contain a mysterious string of letters. It's a strange phrase, encoded with a Cryptarithm. What do the values 92965 67318 314200204 decode to?

CIPHER.386.cipherString: Revolutions have always started in cafes.
CIPHER.386.question: Etched into the bottom of the cafeteria's mystery-cookie tray: this Baconian quote by Martin Firrell. You are told that the deciphered text starts with REVO. What does it say?
CIPHER.386.author: Martin Firrell

CIPHER.396.cipherString: In a way these threats motivate me. They have given my voice more legitimacy.
CIPHER.396.question: You receive an anonymous text message containing a coded passage. It's said to be a quote by Ayaan Hirsi Ali, encrypted with a Checkerboard with a polybius key of BLUEPRINT. What does it say?
CIPHER.396.author: Ayaan Hirsi Ali

CIPHER.385.cipherString: A lot of people do not muster the courage to live their dreams because they are afraid to die.
CIPHER.385.question: You find this encoded line written in invisible ink on a lab safety poster. It's a quote by Les Brown, written in an Aristocrat. You are told that the cipher contains THEY. What does it say?
CIPHER.385.author: Les Brown

CIPHER.399.question: A riddle is discovered taped under a chemistry lab bench. It's a quote, encrypted as a Cryptarithm. What do the values 704 4586 123469 decode to?

CIPHER.406.cipherString: Infinity is a territory toward which the inherent human impetus of conquest can be productively directed.
CIPHER.406.question: Your graphing calculator won’t stop displaying this Aristocrat puzzle by Vanna Bonta. What does it say?
CIPHER.406.author: Vanna Bonta

CIPHER.389.cipherString: The more we are in harmony with nature the more human we become.
CIPHER.389.question: Your lab partner's retainer case clicked open to reveal this Nihilist Substitution-encrypted quote by John Moolachira with a keyword of FARMS and Polybius key of CHEMISTRY. What does it say?
CIPHER.389.author: John Moolachira

CIPHER.392.cipherString: We have outlined under a number of headings our objectives and the ideal for which we struggle.
CIPHER.392.question: While scrolling through an old floppy disk labeled "TOP SECRET", you discovered this quote by Errico Malatesta hidden as an Aristocrat using a K2 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains the word our. What does it say?
CIPHER.392.author: Errico Malatesta

CIPHER.407.cipherString: If a good editor will let me tell my story with the right artist, I'm happy.
CIPHER.407.question: A message in a bottle washed up in the school's decorative fountain—decode this Porta cipher text by Brian K. Vaughan using a keyword of SETUP. What does it say?
CIPHER.407.author: Brian K. Vaughan

CIPHER.394.cipherString: La diferencia entre Novia y Novia es ese pequeño espacio intermedio que llamamos Friend Zone.
CIPHER.394.question: A coded message appears after you shine a UV light on a classroom poster. It turns out to be a quote in Spanish, encrypted using a Xenocrypt using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.394.author: Unknown
CIPHER.394.translation: The difference between Girlfriend and Girl Friend is that little space in between we call the Friend Zone.

CIPHER.393.cipherString: Work expands so as to fill the time available for its completion.
CIPHER.393.question: Archaeologists unearth a stone tablet inscribed with a message. It's a quote by C. Northcote Parkinson encoded as a Complete Columnar. The quote has TIME somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.393.author: C. Northcote Parkinson

CIPHER.405.cipherString: The thermometer of success is merely the jealousy of the malcontents.
CIPHER.405.question: Someone left this coded message in the school lab. You are told it's a quote by Salvador Dali encoded with a Checkerboard with a polybius key of UNSCRAMBLED. What does it say?
CIPHER.405.author: Salvador Dali

CIPHER.401.cipherString: A clever person solves a problem. A wise person avoids it.
CIPHER.401.question: A mysterious QR code on the back of a cereal box leads to this encrypted quote by Albert Einstein using the Nihilist Substitution Cipher with a keyword of MEDALS and polybius key of UNIVERSAL. What does it say?
CIPHER.401.author: Albert Einstein

CIPHER.391.cipherString: In every author let us distinguish the man from his works.
CIPHER.391.question: A glitch in the school's grading portal displayed this string that you recognize as a Baconian cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.391.author: Authors

CIPHER.384.question: The school's ancient overhead projector flickered and burned this Hill message onto the screen—decode Audre Lorde's quote using a keyword of THRU. What does it say?
CIPHER.384.author: Audre Lorde

CIPHER.390.cipherString: You've achieved success in your field when you don't know whether what you're doing is work or play.
CIPHER.390.question: A weathered note is found inside an old science textbook. The writing appears to be a quote by Warren Beatty encoded as an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains the sequence YOU four times. What does it say?
CIPHER.390.author: Warren Beatty

CIPHER.409.cipherString: Shadows are like plants. They need sunlight simply to exist.
CIPHER.409.question: This code is found written in chalk on the sidewalk outside the science building. It's a quote, written in a Fractionated Morse Cipher. You are told that the quote starts with SHADOW. What does it say?

CIPHER.395.cipherString: Science is vastly more stimulating to the imagination than the classics.
CIPHER.395.question: Written in glow-in-the-dark ink on the ceiling of the bio lab, uncover this Complete Columnar quote by J. B. S. Haldane. The quote has IMAGIN somewhere in it. What does it say?
CIPHER.395.author: J. B. S. Haldane

CIPHER.397.cipherString: For me the time passes slowly and joyously away.
CIPHER.397.question: A laser-etched message on the inside of a geodes crystal reads: solve this Baconian version of Horace's wisdom. What does it say?
CIPHER.397.author: Horace

CIPHER.400.cipherString: Sometimes you hold on to things, not because you want to keep them, but because they are difficult to let go.
CIPHER.400.question: You discover a scrap of paper tucked inside an old lab notebook. It contains a quote by Phaedra Patrick encoded as an Aristocrat. You are told that the cipher contains the word you twice. What does it say?
CIPHER.400.author: Phaedra Patrick

CIPHER.408.cipherString: There is no abstract art. You must always start with something. Afterward you can remove all traces of reality.
CIPHER.408.question: Scrawled in dry-erase marker on the whiteboard after hours: this Aristocrat encoded quote by Pablo Picasso using a K1 alphabet. What was the K1 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.408.author: Pablo Picasso

CIPHER.404.cipherString: See? That's what happens when you keep people from doing what they do best: It makes them insane.
CIPHER.404.question: A message was left on the whiteboard after science club. It's a quote by Rene Balcer encoded using an Aristocrat using a K1 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.404.author: Rene Balcer

CIPHER.398.cipherString: Be saving, but not at the cost of all liberality. Have the soul of a king and the hand of a wise economist.
CIPHER.398.question: A fragment of text is discovered in a time capsule from 1965. It's a quote by Joseph Joubert encrypted as an Aristocrat Cipher. What does it say?
CIPHER.398.author: Joseph Joubert

CIPHER.402.cipherString: The scientific theory I like best is that the rings of Saturn are composed entirely of lost airline luggage.
CIPHER.402.question: The message below was intercepted from an experimental satellite transmission. It contains a quote by Mark Russell, encoded as an Aristocrat using a K2 alphabet. You are told that the cipher contains THAT. What was the K2 Keyword used to encode it?
CIPHER.402.author: Mark Russell

CIPHER.388.cipherString: Art is the imposing of a pattern on experience, and our aesthetic enjoyment in recognition of the pattern.
CIPHER.388.question: Your lava lamp started bubbling in Aristocrat code by Alfred North Whitehead using a K2 alphabet. What does it say?
CIPHER.388.author: Alfred North Whitehead
